sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Jesuh mai-ah mi tampi kikhawm uh a,
A min phatna la sa in, gawsem tum uh

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna nei ngeite tua mihon maitang ah,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: A galte, siampi le kumpi suaksak hi,
la thak a sa sak hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hong tatkhiatna om kha zenzen lo hi leh,

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Amah phatna aw nakpi in gingsak ni,
